testcase.name: test_booking_has_room_number_enriched

failure.message: AssertionError: Booking eab2e88d missing room_number! assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_booking_room_move_fix.py:95: in test_booking_has_room_number_enriched assert room_number is not None, f"Booking {booking.get('id')[:8]} missing room_number!" E AssertionError: Booking eab2e88d missing room_number! E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_put_booking_updates_room_number_on_room_change

failure.message: AssertionError: room_number in GET doesn't match! Expected '101', got 'None' assert None == '101' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf0ef956480>('room_number') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf0ef956480> = {'check_in': '2026-02-24T12:42:39.186980+00:00', 'check_out': '2026-02-27T12:42:39.186980+00:00', 'guest_id': 'd11386cd-cc66-4af9-9aec-997687a461f8', 'id': 'acaaa9de-ea24-4671-9a12-d23b3fc78349', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_booking_room_move_fix.py:192: in test_put_booking_updates_room_number_on_room_change assert found_booking.get('room_number') == expected_new_room_number, \ E AssertionError: room_number in GET doesn't match! Expected '101', got 'None' E assert None == '101' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf0ef956480>('room_number') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf0ef956480> = {'check_in': '2026-02-24T12:42:39.186980+00:00', 'check_out': '2026-02-27T12:42:39.186980+00:00', 'guest_id': 'd11386cd-cc66-4af9-9aec-997687a461f8', 'id': 'acaaa9de-ea24-4671-9a12-d23b3fc78349', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_specific_booking_mentioned_in_bug

failure.message: AssertionError: Booking missing room_number! assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf0ef83e180>('room_number') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf0ef83e180> = {'check_in': '2026-03-05', 'check_out': '2026-03-10', 'guest_id': '090db42d-b74d-43c2-b894-0445a5b2ee3f', 'id': '6f9ed1c5-47bd-4271-b154-8482bf293fc8', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_booking_room_move_fix.py:332: in test_specific_booking_mentioned_in_bug assert test_booking.get('room_number') is not None, "Booking missing room_number!" E AssertionError: Booking missing room_number!
